title: Unique Franchise Model
text: Join an innovative franchise with a proven track record and full business support from day one.

title: Cutting-Edge Equipment
text: Our state-of-the-art sugarcane press machines are designed for speed, hygiene, and zero-waste operation.

title: 100% Natural Product
text: No syrups, no preservatives. Every glass is pressed fresh on-site — customers can see it happen.

title: Booming Market
text: Natural drink demand is up 300% in 5 years. The UK has almost no live-press sugarcane brand yet.

title: Full Training Provided
text: From machine operation to customer service — we give you everything you need to open confidently.

title: Low Overheads
text: No kitchen. No cook. Minimal staff. Compact footprint fits markets, malls, festivals & high streets.
